data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the requirement for send-time optimization.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific feature 'send-time optimization (send when customer usually opens)'. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this feature is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without direct evidence, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of send-time optimization.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for send-time optimization
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system sends messages based on customer opening patterns.
